user.title: Set up Home Assistant Telemetry
user.description: Choose managed enrollment for a hosted data hub or advanced setup for a manually configured broker.

managed.title: Managed hub enrollment
managed.description: Enter the data_hub API URL, your enrollment token, and the entities to share. Example: http://100.64.0.10:8000 or https://hub.example.com

advanced.title: Advanced MQTT setup
advanced.description: Configure direct MQTT access for self-hosted or lab environments.

reauth_managed.title: Refresh managed hub credentials
reauth_managed.description: Enter the same data_hub API URL and a fresh enrollment token to rotate the broker credentials for this site.

reauth_advanced.title: Refresh MQTT credentials
reauth_advanced.description: Update the direct broker credentials used by this site.

reconfigure_managed.title: Reconfigure managed hub settings
reconfigure_managed.description: Update the local entity selection and the data_hub API URL.

reconfigure_advanced.title: Reconfigure advanced MQTT settings
reconfigure_advanced.description: Update the direct broker settings and local entity selection.

error.cannot_connect: Enrollment succeeded, but Home Assistant could not connect to the MQTT broker returned by the hub.
error.cannot_reach_hub: Could not reach the hub API URL. Check the URL, Tailscale connectivity, and that port 8000 is reachable.
error.command_entities_not_subset: Command-enabled entities must also be selected for telemetry.
error.hub_rejected_enrollment: The hub rejected the enrollment request.
error.hub_request_failed: The hub request failed before enrollment could complete.
error.hub_timeout: Timed out waiting for the hub to respond.
error.invalid_enrollment_response: The hub returned an invalid enrollment response.
error.invalid_enrollment_token: The enrollment token is invalid, expired, revoked, or already used.
error.invalid_hub_url: Enter the full hub API URL, including http:// or https://.
error.invalid_site_id: Use lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores for the site ID.
error.missing_file: The custom CA certificate file could not be found.

abort.already_configured: This site ID is already configured.
